verses.text: Persia gam uk Kumpipa Darias in a uk a kum nihna, a kha giatna sungin Topa in kamsang Zekhariah tungah thu a gen hi. Zekhariah pen Berekhiah' tapa hi a, ama pu Iddo ahi hi
Topa in Zekhariah kiangah, “Mite tungah hih bangin thu gen in: ‘Na pu na pate uh tungah Topa ahi keimah ka heh mahmah hi
Ahi zongin tu-in kei kiangah hong ciahkik le uh cin, kei zong note kiangah kong paikik ding hi

Na pu na pate uh bang nawn kei un. Nidanga kamsangte in amaute kiangah ka thu gen uh a, gamtatsia gamta loin, a mawh nawnlohna ding hilh uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ka thu ngainuam loin, ka thu hong manglo uh hi
Tu-in na pu na pate uh koi-ah om ahi hiam? Tua kamsangte nungtalai sa na hi uh hiam

Ahi zongin ka nasem ahi kamsangte' tung tawnin ka hilhkholhna leh ka thupiaknate in note dongin hong sukhalo ding sa na hi uh hiam, ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a tawpna-ah amaute kisik uh a, hih dinga ka lungsimah ka geelsa bangin amau' gamtatna tawh kizui-in gim a pia ka hihna thu a phawk uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi.
Darias in a uk a kum nihna kum, kha sawmlekhatna ahi Shebat kha ni sawmnih leh ni li ni-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a, zanin maang hong musak hi
Topa' vantung mi khat sakol san khat tungah a tuang ka mu hi. Kuam sunga a om mui singkungte lakah amah khawl a, ama nungah sakol dang a san, a gial, a kang om hi
Tua ciangin keimah in, “Sia aw, hih sakolte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Bang a cihnopna hiam cih kong lak ding hi
Hih sakol tung tuangte pai kawikawi-in leitung a en dingin Topa in a sawl ahi hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin mui kung lakah a khawl Topa' vantung mite kiangah amaute in, “Leitung khempeuh ka en kawikawi khin uh a, leitung khempeuh khuaphawk loin nuamtakin om uh hi,” ci-in thu a zasak uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa' vantung mi in, “Vanglian Topa aw, Jerusalem khuapi leh Judah gam khuapite tungah kum sawmsagih sung na heh khinta hi. Amaute hehpih loin bang tanvei omlai ding na hi hiam?” ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in dikna leh hehnepna kam tawh vantung mite dawng a
Vanglian Topa in ama tungah a gensa thute khempeuh keimah in ka taangko sawnna dingin tua vantung mi in kei hong sawl a, “Ka khuapi siangtho Jerusalem, nakpi takin itin ka lunghimawh hi
Tua bangin nuamtakin a om hithiat minamte tungah ka heh mahmah hi. Ka mite tungah ka hehna ki-ip tentanin ka om laitakin, hih minam dangte in ka mite' gimna nasiasak semsem uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khuapi tungah ka hehpihna a lak dingin ka hong paikik hi. Tua khuapi sungah ka biakinn kilamkik ding a, khuapikulh zong kiciangkik ding hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi

Tua ciangin vantung mi in ka taangkona ding hong genkik leuleu a, “Ama khuapite nakpi takin cithei kikin, Jerusalem khuapi a hehnep kikna ding, leh ama khuapi-in a neihkikna ding, Vanglian Topa in gen hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Kamsangpa in Saki Li leh Sek tawi Mi Li A Muhna

verses.text: Ka khuadak leh saki li ka mu hi
Bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in vantung mi kiangah ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Judah mite leh Jerusalem mite a thehthang gawp leitung vangliatnate a cihnopna ahi hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in sek tawi mihing li hong lak hi

Hih mite, bang hih ding ahi hiam, ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Hih saki lite in Judah mite thehthang gawp a, a lang uhah kuamah pang ngamlo ahih manin, Judah gam sugawpin a mite a thehthang gawp minamte, tu-in hih sek tawi lite in lausakin a lawnthal ding ahi hi,” hong ci hi.
